steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The passage presents two facts: Quito has a higher park usage rate (82.9%) than Lima (72.7%), yet Quito residents report significantly lower access to other desired amenities near parks. The passage builds its entire conclusion from this contrast.

steps.title: Match the contrast to the main conclusion
steps.content:
Because Quito has higher park usage despite having fewer nearby amenities, the passage concludes that this difference cannot be explained by amenity access.

Choice D directly states this conclusion—the higher park usage in Quito is not due to greater access to nearby amenities.

The other choices either reverse the relationship or introduce factors not discussed in the passage.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
